**ABOUT MY BOTS**
 *→ Most (if not, all) of my bots use jLMM*
 *→ I only do ANY POV and FEM POV for my published and every bot*

**TIPS ON IMPROVING CHATTING EXPERIENCE**
*If you want to give the bot a specific command or set-up rule, (ex: your pronouns, genitalia) you can use the advanced prompt on API Settings or Chat Memory to input it.*

 *If the bot is typing in **your** perspective (especially if you've already played with the chat memory or advanced prompt), delete the part of when it did and make the bot generate another message for you. Short and less detailed messages are usually the cause of the bot typing for you though..*

*If you're feeling less creative or just pretty lazy to type a detailed message, you can click/press the Continue icon (basically ▹▹). It will either continue the dialog or generate a message from your perspective. If it doesn't choose the latter, then skip the message and repeat the same thing.*
